title: Revenue bills
doc_html:
§52.  Revenue bills

The governor may cause revenue raising bills to be introduced in accordance with the proposals submitted under authority of R.S. 39:38.

Acts 1989, No. 836, §1, eff. July 1, 1989.
doc_text:
§52.  Revenue bills
The governor may cause revenue raising bills to be introduced in accordance with the proposals submitted under authority of R.S. 39:38.
Acts 1989, No. 836, §1, eff. July 1, 1989.
